mapper.select: SELECT * FROM colonelsettlement_order WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO colonelsettlement_order ( id, order_id, product_id, product_name, shop_id, shop_name, order_amount, actual_amount, settle_amount, estimate_service_fee, effective_service_fee, estimate_tech_service_fee, effective_tech_service_fee, colonel_buyin_id, settle_colonel_commission, settle_colonel_tech_service_fee, second_colonel_buyin_id, second_colonel_activity_id, settle_second_colonel_commission, flow_point, phase_id, order_status, order_type, pick_source, cursor, talent_id, channel_user_id, channel_user_name, channel_dept_id, user_id, dept_id, colonel_user_id, colonel_user_name, promotion_link_id, product_title, talent_name, colonel_activity_id, pay_time, order_create_time, settle_time, attribution_status, attribution_remark, create_time, update_time, version, deleted, extra_data ) SELECT #{id}, #{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{shopId}, #{shopName}, #{orderAmount}, #{actualAmount}, #{settleAmount}, #{estimateServiceFee}, #{effectiveServiceFee}, #{estimateTechServiceFee}, #{effectiveTechServiceFee}, #{colonelBuyinId}, #{settleColonelCommission}, #{settleColonelTechServiceFee}, #{secondColonelBuyinId}, #{secondActivityId}, #{settleSecondColonelCommission}, #{flowPoint}, #{phaseId}, #{orderStatus}, #{orderType}, #{pickSource}, #{cursor}, #{talentId}, #{channelUserId}, #{channelUserName}, #{channelDeptId}, #{userId}, #{deptId}, #{colonelUserId}, #{colonelUserName}, #{promotionLinkId}, #{productTitle}, #{talentName}, #{activityId}, #{payTime}, #{orderCreateTime}, #{settleTime}, #{attributionStatus}, #{attributionRemark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, COALESCE(#{version}, 0), #{deleted}, CAST(#{extraData, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler} AS JSONB) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM colonelsettlement_order WHERE order_id = #{orderId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE colonelsettlement_order SET order_id = #{orderId}, product_id = #{productId}, product_name = #{productName}, shop_id = #{shopId}, shop_name = #{shopName}, order_amount = #{orderAmount}, actual_amount = #{actualAmount}, settle_amount = #{settleAmount}, estimate_service_fee = #{estimateServiceFee}, effective_service_fee = #{effectiveServiceFee}, estimate_tech_service_fee = #{estimateTechServiceFee}, effective_tech_service_fee = #{effectiveTechServiceFee}, colonel_buyin_id = #{colonelBuyinId}, settle_colonel_commission = #{settleColonelCommission}, settle_colonel_tech_service_fee = #{settleColonelTechServiceFee}, second_colonel_buyin_id = #{secondColonelBuyinId}, second_colonel_activity_id = #{secondActivityId}, settle_second_colonel_commission = #{settleSecondColonelCommission}, flow_point = #{flowPoint}, phase_id = #{phaseId}, order_status = #{orderStatus}, order_type = #{orderType}, pick_source = #{pickSource}, cursor = #{cursor}, talent_id = #{talentId}, channel_user_id = #{channelUserId}, channel_user_name = #{channelUserName}, channel_dept_id = #{channelDeptId}, user_id = #{userId}, dept_id = #{deptId}, colonel_user_id = #{colonelUserId}, colonel_user_name = #{colonelUserName}, promotion_link_id = #{promotionLinkId}, product_title = #{productTitle}, talent_name = #{talentName}, colonel_activity_id = #{activityId}, pay_time = #{payTime}, order_create_time = #{orderCreateTime}, settle_time = #{settleTime}, attribution_status = #{attributionStatus}, attribution_remark = #{attributionRemark}, update_time = #{updateTime}, version = COALESCE(version, 0) + 1, deleted = #{deleted}, extra_data = CAST(#{extraData, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler} AS JSONB) WHERE id = #{id} AND version = COALESCE(#{version}, 0)
